status_summary: Amber because risk risk, milestone risk are driving the highest weighted pressure.
reasons: The risk register contains 3 active items with a meaningful concentration of high and critical entries.
20% of milestones are marked delayed and 40% are overdue as of 2026-07-08.
recommendations: Convert critical risks into named mitigation actions with target resolution dates.
Turn delayed milestones into a dated recovery plan with explicit checkpoint owners.
Re-baseline overdue work and assign owners for the next two milestone dates.
assumptions: Used the workbook's project summary row as the primary source of truth for current-state metrics.
Did not use the provided RAG column as an input; treated it only as an optional validation reference.
